name: Orange Molasses Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, soda, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the nuts to the dry mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the evaporated milk, orange rind, orange juice, melted shortening, and molasses.
4. Pour the liquid ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Grease a 9x5x3 inch loaf pan with butter or oil.
6. Line the bottom of the pan with wax paper.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 325°F for one hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes 1 loaf.
